metadata.description: Allow public network access to PostgreSQL (disable for production)
Container registry server (leave empty for public registries)
Email address for alert and budget notifications
Storage account ID for role assignment
Document Intelligence account ID for role assignment
OpenAI account ID for role assignment
Application Insights ID for role assignment
Principal ID of the managed identity that needs access

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('{0}-vault', parameters('namePrefix'))), parameters('managedIdentityPrincipalId'), 'Key Vault Secrets User')]

metadata.description: Object ID of the managed identity to set as Entra admin (same as principal ID)
Allow public network access (set to false for production)
Name of the Azure Container Registry
Tags to apply to the resource
Principal ID of the managed identity that needs AcrPull access

properties.description: [format('Fires when more than {0}% of requests return 5xx status codes over a 5-minute window.', parameters('errorRateThreshold'))]

allOf.query:
requests
            | where timestamp > ago(5m)
            | summarize totalRequests = count(), failedRequests = countif(toint(resultCode) >= 500)
            | extend errorRate = iff(totalRequests == 0, 0.0, (toreal(failedRequests) / toreal(totalRequests)) * 100)
            | project errorRate

properties.description: [format('Fires when P95 response time exceeds {0}s over a 5-minute window.', parameters('latencyThresholdSeconds'))]

allOf.query:
requests
            | where timestamp > ago(5m)
            | summarize p95_duration_s = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000
            | project p95_duration_s

properties.description: Fires when any pipeline failure is recorded (pipeline_failures custom metric > 0).

allOf.query:
customMetrics
            | where timestamp > ago(5m)
            | where name == 'pipeline_failures'
            | summarize totalFailures = sum(value)
            | project totalFailures

metadata.description: Budget start date (YYYY-MM-01 format, defaults to current month)
Name prefix for container app resources
Container registry server (leave empty for public registries)
